creator: dave@daveg.ca
text:
When I poudriere bulk <stuff ... more stuff> -a

... I get the following:

[00:02:51] Error: compute_deps_pkg failed to lookup pkgname for mail/squirrelmail-change_sqlpass-plugin@php82 processing package squirrelmail-plugins-php82-1.0_2 from mail/squirrelmail-plugins@php82 -- Is SUBDIR+=squirrelmail-change_sqlpass-plugin@php82 missing in mail/Makefile and does the port provide the 'php82' FLAVOR?
[00:02:51] Error: compute_deps_pkg failed to lookup pkgname for mail/squirrelmail-sasql-plugin@php82 processing package squirrelmail-plugins-php82-1.0_2 from mail/squirrelmail-plugins@php82 -- Is SUBDIR+=squirrelmail-sasql-plugin@php82 missing in mail/Makefile and does the port provide the 'php82' FLAVOR?
[00:02:51] Error: compute_deps_pkg failed to lookup existing pkgname for mail/squirrelmail-sasql-plugin@php82 processing package squirrelmail-plugins-php82-1.0_2
[00:02:51] Error: compute_deps_pkg failed to lookup existing pkgname for mail/squirrelmail-change_sqlpass-plugin@php82 processing package squirrelmail-plugins-php82-1.0_2
[00:02:51] Error: Fatal errors encountered calculating dependencies

I have confirmed this failure with both 13.0 and 13.1
